text:

Log:
  x11/dmenu: Update 4.7 -> 4.8

  0mp@FreeBSD.org takes maintainership.

  Port changes:

  * Remove FREETYPEINC patch, add it as a variable to MAKE_ARGS
  * Monor change in pkg-descr
  * Change WWW to https
